<!-- WARNING: this file was generated by Pulumi Docs Generator. -->

This is a test resource that demonstrates various property types and documentation features.

## Example Usage

```typescript
import * as pulumi from "@pulumi/pulumi";
import * as testprovider from "@pulumi/testprovider";

const example = new testprovider.TestResource("example", {
    name: "test-resource",
    tags: {
        environment: "test"
    },
    count: 42,
    enabled: true
});
```




## Create TestResource Resource {#create}

Resources are created with functions called constructors. To learn more about declaring and configuring resources, see [Resources](/docs/concepts/resources/).

### Constructor example

The following reference example uses placeholder values for all [input properties](#inputs).
<div>
<pulumi-chooser type="language" options="csharp,go,typescript,python,yaml,java"></pulumi-chooser>
</div>


<div>
<pulumi-choosable type="language" values="csharp">

```csharp
var testResourceResource = new TestProvider.TestResource("testResourceResource", new()
{
    Count = 0,
    Enabled = false,
    Name = "string",
    Tags = 
    {
        { "string", "string" },
    },
});
```

</pulumi-choosable>
</div>


<div>
<pulumi-choosable type="language" values="go">

```go
example, err := testprovider.NewTestResource(ctx, "testResourceResource", &testprovider.TestResourceArgs{
	Count:   pulumi.Int(0),
	Enabled: pulumi.Bool(false),
	Name:    pulumi.String("string"),
	Tags: pulumi.StringMap{
		"string": pulumi.String("string"),
	},
})
```

</pulumi-choosable>
</div>


<div>
<pulumi-choosable type="language" values="java">

```java
var testResourceResource = new TestResource("testResourceResource", TestResourceArgs.builder()
    .count(0)
    .enabled(false)
    .name("string")
    .tags(Map.of("string", "string"))
    .build());
```

</pulumi-choosable>
</div>


<div>
<pulumi-choosable type="language" values="python">

```python
test_resource_resource = testprovider.TestResource("testResourceResource",
    count=0,
    enabled=False,
    name="string",
    tags={
        "string": "string",
    })
```

</pulumi-choosable>
</div>


<div>
<pulumi-choosable type="language" values="typescript">

```typescript
const testResourceResource = new testprovider.TestResource("testResourceResource", {
    count: 0,
    enabled: false,
    name: "string",
    tags: {
        string: "string",
    },
});
```

</pulumi-choosable>
</div>


<div>
<pulumi-choosable type="language" values="yaml">

```yaml
type: testprovider:TestResource
properties:
    count: 0
    enabled: false
    name: string
    tags:
        string: string
```

</pulumi-choosable>
</div>
